rulings.Case Title: EDWARDO ESCULLAR COMBES VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 7, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE and BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer at to causes of action for (1) declaratory relief; (2) negligence; (3) negligent misrepresentation; (4) violations of Rosenthal Act; (5) Accounting; and (6) Injunctive relief. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amend complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CNADY LLC VS. JOSEPH MELTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 7, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JOSEPH MELTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is overruled as to forcible entry cause of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges ultimate facts. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to forcible detainer cause of action to allege all elements of this cause of action per CCP 1160(1) and/or (2). Complaint is not uncertain. Plaintiff shall prepare order. = (501/REQ)
